name: Unraveling Kamala Harris's genealogy
overview: In this provocative series, political commentator Candace Owens embarks on a personal mission to scrutinize Kamala Harris's ancestry, questioning the authenticity of her racial identity. Each episode reveals new findings, interviews, and controversies surrounding Harris's lineage, aiming to uncover what Owens believes are the truths and lies behind the Vice President's narrative.

trailers.title: LeBron James Is TOO Quiet About Diddy | Candace Ep 70
